properties.name: Community Bush Ride
properties.subtitle: Mount Mee Forest Run
properties.pace: Social pace. No one gets dropped.
properties.description: The winter big one. We roll out of Dayboro just after first light, spin the valley flats to warm the legs, then hit the forestry climbs up onto the Mount Mee plateau. Regroups at every junction, a coffee-and-scroll stop at the top, and a long loose descent back down the range. Expect a solid morning out — steady climbing, big views west over the Brisbane Valley, and no one left behind.
properties.kit_note: This one climbs hard — bring a light layer for the descent off the range.

properties.name: Community Bush Ride
properties.subtitle: Pomona Weekend Gravel
properties.pace: Social pace. No one gets dropped.
properties.description: A relaxed hinterland spin out of Pomona — quiet gravel back roads, a creek crossing or two, and a bakery finish. This ride has already happened; it stays on the map as part of the record.
properties.kit_note: Mostly flat and fast. Bring a vest for the early start.
